data.content: Added OpenRouter multi-agent schema support via openrouter.agents (id -> model+label), retained deprecated openrouter.model, and auto-migrated legacy model into agents.default when agents is empty. Updated settings normalization so backfills persist migrated shape, plus settings/openrouter tests and settings OpenAPI schema coverage. Quality gates: lint (warnings only), tsc, and full tests passed; build fails on main baseline due existing Next.js prerender error on /beats and /_global-error.
